skill.name: code-review-type-safety
skill.description: Type-safety review lens for catching schema mismatches, unsafe coercions, missing annotations, and weak contracts during code review.
skill.author: Agent Skills Team

name: code-review-type-safety
description: Type-safety review lens for public API typing, runtime validation, unsafe casts, and generic discipline.

categories.name: Type Coverage
categories.description: Typed public APIs, critical internals, and avoiding implicit any gaps

categories.name: Type Correctness
categories.description: Annotations, assertions, and guards that match real behavior

categories.name: Type Safety
categories.description: Unsafe casts, unknown data, discriminated unions, and runtime checks

categories.name: Generic Discipline
categories.description: Constraints, parameter bounds, and avoiding generic overuse
